narrative:
Austinburg Twp township has 1,602 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a clear Republican lean of 11.9 percentage points.
